OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The token used by the connector to authenticate to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_ID.description: A stable UUID for this connector instance.

CONNECTOR_NAME.description: Name of the connector shown in OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: STIX object scope currently imported by the connector.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Determines the verbosity of runtime logs.

TRUKNO_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the TruKno API.

TRUKNO_API_KEY.description: API key used to authenticate to TruKno.

TRUKNO_INTERVAL_MINUTES.description: Polling interval in minutes between connector cycles.

TRUKNO_INITIAL_LOOKBACK_DAYS.description: Number of days to backfill on the first run before a checkpoint exists.

TRUKNO_CONNECTOR_CONFIG.description: Optional explicit path to a config.yml file used for manual or packaged runs.
